subject: Mathematics
topic: Compare package options with compact records

task_sheet.title: Compact Comparison Record
instructions: Use short marks and short values, not paragraph responses.
Choose or fill only where the sheet gives you a target.

tasks.label: Part A
tasks.prompt: Fill in the missing short values from the comparison notes.

render_hints.heading: Fill in the missing values
blank_prompts: The small package is ___ cm wide.

tasks.label: Part B
tasks.prompt: Select the package option that seems most efficient right now.

tasks.label: Part C
tasks.prompt: Choose one option in each comparison row.

render_hints.heading: Choose one option in each row

tasks.label: Part D
tasks.prompt: Give one brief checkpoint response about which option seems strongest so far.

render_hints.heading: Quick checkpoint
render_hints.help: Keep this to one or two short lines.

embedded_supports: Use selector boxes for choices, not explanations.
Use the fill targets for short values only.
success_criteria: I kept selections clear and compact.
I filled only the short value targets.
